dimensions.name: Governance Awareness
dimensions.rationale: The agent maintained 100% schema validation consistency across all orchestration phases. The inclusion of 'rules-context-loader' and 'alignment-engine' with successful validation confirms that architectural constraints were actively loaded and verified.

dimensions.name: Causal Reasoning Depth
dimensions.rationale: Strong analytical depth is demonstrated by the 'architecture-work-to-evolution-map' step, which processed 48,971 prompt tokens. This indicates a high-fidelity mapping of incoming work requirements against the existing architectural state.

dimensions.name: Architectural Tension Analysis
dimensions.rationale: The alignment engine successfully evaluated architectural tensions, processing over 27k tokens to reconcile work items with governance rules. The clean transition to the intent-generator suggests successful resolution of identified trade-offs.
